assertions.title: Hero section renders with headline, tagline, and CTAs

steps.action: Open http://localhost:3200 in browser session 0f916ecfbd72__u2 at 1440px width
steps.expected: Hero section is visible on load
steps.observed: Hero section rendered above the fold with the dark terminal-style background

steps.expected: One headline, one supporting tagline, and both hero CTAs are present with non-empty text
steps.observed: Found `#hero-heading` text `One install for your agent's full CMO brain.`, supporting paragraph beginning `Give AI agents...`, primary CTA `Get Started`, and secondary CTA `View on GitHub`

evidence.network: GET / -> 200 (curl); no API requests involved in this assertion

measurements.headlineText: One install for your agent's full CMO brain.
measurements.taglineText: Give AI agents the marketing system they need to research, position, launch, and compound growth with brand memory, parallel research, and reusable campaign skills built into one workflow.

assertions.title: Primary CTA scrolls to install section

steps.expected: CTA shows a visible hover state and remains pointer-interactive
steps.observed: CTA background changed from `oklch(0.765 0.177 163.223)` to `oklch(0.845 0.143 164.978)` with `cursor:pointer`

steps.expected: Page scrolls to the install section with target top within 100px of viewport top

evidence.network: In-page anchor scroll only; no API requests. Initial page GET / -> 200

assertions.title: Secondary CTA links to GitHub repository

steps.action: Inspect the `View on GitHub` CTA attributes
steps.expected: CTA is an anchor to a valid github.com URL with `target=_blank` and `rel=noopener noreferrer`
steps.observed: Anchor href was `https://github.com/moizibnyousaf/mktg`, target was `_blank`, and rel was `noopener noreferrer`

evidence.network: No navigation triggered during attribute inspection

steps.action: Capture a clean desktop screenshot of the hero
steps.expected: Decorative glow/gradient effects are visible behind hero content
steps.observed: Screenshot shows emerald/blue glow accents and radial gradients behind the hero copy and card

steps.action: Inspect decorative elements and contrast values
steps.expected: Hero includes gradient/glow layers and text contrast remains WCAG AA compliant
steps.observed: Detected multiple radial-gradient/blur layers in the hero; measured contrast against body background at 19.28:1 for the headline and 13.57:1 for the tagline

evidence.network: Static render only; no API requests involved

gradientDetails.backgroundImage: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.26), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 46%), radial-gradient(circle at 100% 0%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18), rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 34%)

steps.expected: No horizontal overflow and hero content remains visible/readable
steps.observed: Desktop viewport had `scrollWidth = 1440`, matching the viewport width

steps.expected: No horizontal overflow and CTA row remains visible
steps.observed: Tablet viewport had `scrollWidth = 768`; headline and CTA bounds stayed within left/right edges (headline 40→728, CTAs 40→363.69)

steps.expected: No horizontal overflow and all hero elements remain visible/readable
steps.observed: Mobile viewport had `scrollWidth = 375`; headline and both stacked CTAs fit within 24→351 with no horizontal clipping

assertions.title: Hero headline uses semantic h1 (only one on page)

steps.action: Query all `h1` elements on the page
steps.expected: Exactly one h1 exists and it belongs to the hero
steps.observed: `document.querySelectorAll('h1').length` returned 1, and the single heading was `#hero-heading` inside the hero section

evidence.network: DOM-only inspection; no API requests involved

measurements.headlineText: One install for your agent's full CMO brain.

assertions.title: Hero headline and tagline contain expected content

steps.expected: Headline references the mktg value proposition with agent + CMO/marketing language
steps.observed: Headline was `One install for your agent's full CMO brain.` containing `agent` and `CMO`

steps.expected: Tagline describes giving AI agents marketing capabilities and is not placeholder copy
steps.observed: Tagline explicitly described giving AI agents a marketing system to research, position, launch, and compound growth; no placeholder text was present

evidence.network: DOM-only inspection; no API requests involved

measurements.headlineText: One install for your agent's full CMO brain.
measurements.taglineText: Give AI agents the marketing system they need to research, position, launch, and compound growth with brand memory, parallel research, and reusable campaign skills built into one workflow.

summary: Tested 7 hero assertions: 7 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. The hero rendered correctly, both CTAs behaved as specified, decorative gradients preserved strong contrast, and the hero remained responsive at desktop, tablet, and mobile widths.
